title: Scientific Posters & Research | Gain Therapeutics
description: Recent research has led to the development of novel treatments for Parkinson's disease, including GT-02287, a small molecule allosteric modulator of the lysosomal enzyme Glucocerebrosidase (GCase). This molecule has shown promise in improving mitochondrial function and providing a neuroprotective effect in models of GBA1-Parkinson's disease. Studies have also demonstrated that GT-02287 can protect dopaminergic neurons against mitochondrial toxins and prevent Tau accumulation in cellular models. Overall, these findings suggest that targeting GCase with allosteric modulators like GT-02287 may be a viable therapeutic approach for the treatment of Parkinson's disease.

title: Investor Overview & Company Info | Gain Therapeutics
description: Gain Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of next-generation allosteric therapies, with a lead drug candidate, GT-02287, currently in a Phase 1 clinical trial for the treatment of Parkinson's disease and other neurodegenerative diseases. The company's Magellan drug discovery platform leverages AI, physics-based methods, and supercomputing power to identify novel allosteric binding sites and potential first-in-class drug candidates. With a vast library of 5 trillion compounds, Gain Therapeutics is transforming the drug discovery process, enabling the rapid identification of new therapeutic opportunities. By combining cutting-edge technology with a focus on neurodegenerative diseases, the company aims to improve treatment options for patients in need.

title: Parkinson’s 101: Symptoms, Care & Resources | Gain
description: The provided article appears to be a collection of blog posts and articles related to Parkinson's disease, offering various resources and support for individuals affected by the condition. The posts cover topics such as adapting homes for people with Parkinson's, providing caregiver support, and promoting awareness about the disease. Additionally, the articles discuss advancements in neurology, self-care tips, and therapeutics for Parkinson's disease. By sharing personal stories and expert insights, these resources aim to educate and empower individuals impacted by Parkinson's disease.
